stages.name: Order created
stages.authority_notes: Created by customer on eStore. No factory authority. External to factory scope.

stages.name: Order approved
stages.authority_notes: Approved by sales manager. External to factory scope.

stages.name: Order received

hard_stop_controls.trigger: missing required field OR unknown model (no recipe)
hard_stop_controls.action: reject order; report reason to upstream system

stages.authority_notes: Approved order validated at factory boundary. Invalid or unknown-model orders rejected with reason. No override.

stages.name: Parts allocated

hard_stop_controls.action: supervisor re-allocates replacement serial of same type; log who/when/why/old_serial/new_serial; both serials retained in genealogy

stages.authority_notes: Supervisor can re-allocate parts. Original and replacement both retained in genealogy. Release reason code reported to inventory module.

stages.name: Assembly

hard_stop_controls.note: Part correctness enforced upstream by inventory operator. Bench scan is the verification gate.

stages.authority_notes: No operator override on assembly hardstops. Successful scan marries serial to device genealogy.

stages.name: Software & firmware install
stages.authority_notes: Every device receives the same pinned validated factory baseline. No cloud identity yet at this stage.

stages.name: Software & firmware update from cloud

hard_stop_controls.action: hard-block all affected units until cloud connectivity returns
hard_stop_controls.decision_note: Production throughput is intentionally coupled to cloud availability at stage 7. A cloud or connectivity outage halts all affected units with no override. Chosen deliberately to guarantee every shipped unit carries the latest production SW/FW.

stages.authority_notes: HARD BLOCK — NO OVERRIDE. Cloud must be reachable. Documented management decision. Alert floor on block.

stages.name: Cloud provisioning
stages.authority_notes: Device enrolled with cloud, issued permanent cloud identity/credentials. Cloud identity is separate from genealogy serial, rotatable, bound 1:1.

stages.name: Hardware checks / setup

hard_stop_controls.fail_action: route to hardware rework, then re-enter stage 9

stages.authority_notes: Configuration-driven hardware checks against the ordered model recipe. Verifies built unit matches order. Fail routes to hardware rework then re-enters stage 9.

stages.name: Calibration

hard_stop_controls.trigger: any reference standard expired or lacking a valid certificate

hard_stop_controls.on_pass: record passing run on certificate; retain all attempts internally

calibration_metadata.certificate_policy: Shipped certificate shows only the valid passing run; full internal record retains all attempts.

stages.authority_notes: GATE. Max 3 calibration attempts. Expired standard is a hardstop with no override. On cap exceeded, supervisor must disposition (route to stage 9, or scrap). Scrap requires manager tier.

stages.name: Quality Control

hard_stop_controls.fail_action: route to QC rework/disposition, then re-enter stage 11
hard_stop_controls.pass_action: finalize record and authorize unit for stage 12 and shipping

qc_metadata.separation_of_duty_note: QC signer cannot be the person who did the work on that unit (RBAC-3, RBAC-4).

stages.authority_notes: GATE. Final human sign-off on physical unit and complete record. Separation of duty enforced (signer != worker). Pass finalizes production record and authorizes stage 12 + shipping.

stages.name: Cloud backup

hard_stop_controls.action: hard-block unit; cannot proceed to packaging/shipping until backed up
hard_stop_controls.decision_note: As at stage 7, the line is intentionally coupled to cloud availability. A device must not leave the floor until its irreplaceable record is preserved off-site. Accepted deliberately.

stages.authority_notes: HARD BLOCK — NO OVERRIDE. Unit's complete factory record must be backed up before proceeding. Documented management decision.

stages.name: Package
stages.authority_notes: Separable into a future fulfillment system. Destination, carrier, and tracking are out of scope.

stages.name: Ship
stages.authority_notes: TERMINAL. Factory lifecycle complete at shipped. Record immutable. Destination/carrier/tracking out of scope (reserved for fulfillment).
